wordplay_note: First reality-ruler: a paranoid religious fanatic
card_description: Charley McFeyffe is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Eye in the Sky*. Bigoted old woman whose subjective universe becomes the group's shared reality. Name note: First reality-ruler: a paranoid religious fanatic. Each character's inner world revealed as a totalitarian cosmos. First appears in *Eye in the Sky*.

reference.brief: Bigoted old woman whose subjective universe becomes the group's shared reality
reference.significance: Each character's inner world revealed as a totalitarian cosmos
